name: Chinese Chicken Salad in Wun Tun Baskets
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds Chicken Breasts or Thighs -- cooked and shredded
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix together the sugar, vinegar, salad oil, salt, and brown sugar until well combined.
2. Pour the mixture over the chicken and marinate for at least 20 minutes, or longer if desired.
3. Heat oil to 375°F (190°C).
4. Place one Wun tun wrapper in a basket ladle. Fit another ladle on top of the wrapper to hold it in place.
5. Deep fry in hot oil until golden brown. Remove and drain on paper towels.
6. Repeat with remaining wrappers until all are made into mini baskets.
7. Arrange the baskets on a platter lined with lettuce.
8. Fill each basket with lettuce, chicken, green onion, and almonds.
9. Serve immediately. Makes 10 servings.
(Note: This recipe was demonstrated by Nanakuli High School Food Service students Fredlum Paaluhi, Janifer Salvacion, Chanda Talbert, and Christopher Wilcox in June 1995. Reprinted with permission from The Electric Kitchen & Hawaiian Electric Company, Inc.)
